hooks.command: echo '[Recent project activity]'; tail -10 'working files/changelog.md' 2>/dev/null || echo '(no changelog yet)'

echo '[Team-leader mailbox]'; any=0; for f in team/team-leader/from-product-owner.md team/team-leader/from-plant-nutrition-specialist.md; do entries=$(awk '/^## Entries/{flag=1; next} flag' "$f" 2>/dev/null | sed '/^[[:space:]]*$/d'); if [ -n "$entries" ]; then echo "--- $f ---"; echo "$entries"; any=1; fi; done; [ $any -eq 0 ] && echo '(empty)'; true
